free_text: Measurements of the fast neutron-induced prompt
Ion beam of protons and deuterons were pulsed to
2 MHz, and bunched to 1.5 - 2.0 nanosec in full
width at half-maximum. Average beam current was
Metallic lithium for 0.55 MeV neutron energy
D2-gas cell for 4.1 MeV neutron energy
NE213 Liquid scintillation detector 12.7 cm in
Lead sample was used in order to evaluate background
components and the tail of the elastic peak
Corrections were made for time resolution, for flux
attenuation and multiple scattering within the samples
